title: Zendaya Joins On Running as Brand Partner
text: Zendaya Coleman was announced as a multi-year brand partner for On Running in June 2024. Under the agreement, the actress would help the company drive meaningful conversations around movement and well-being, reimagine select product collections, and produce future creative campaigns. The partnership marked a significant strategic initiative for On to build brand awareness and appeal to younger demographics, particularly among women. The collaboration combined Zendaya's global influence and connection with younger audiences with On's innovation-driven premium performance brand positioning. The partnership proved highly effective, contributing to record Q3 2024 results and significant brand awareness growth.
